patches.name: Add Packet Handler
patches.description:
Adding the Loco Packet Handler allows external applications to handle the app's packets, which may compromise security.
Conflicts may occur on some systems.

patches.name: Add Pine Lib
patches.description: add libpine.so to the app's native libraries

patches.name: Add notification shortcut
patches.description: Adds a notification shortcut button above quick write in the post list.

patches.name: Add shared user ID
patches.description: Adds or updates the sharedUserId attribute in the app's manifest. This allows multiple apps with the same sharedUserId to share data and run in the same process. Use with caution as this can affect app permissions and data isolation.

options.title: Shared User ID
options.description: The shared user ID to add to the app's manifest.

patches.name: Adjust image download menu
patches.description: Moves the image download menu buttons upward by adding bottom padding.

options.title: Bottom padding
options.description: Bottom padding in dp for the image download menu. The original value is 10dp.

patches.name: Allow Hide on Any Chat
patches.description: Users with hiding privileges can hide any chat, including their own messages.

patches.name: Allow reply to feed
patches.description: Allows replying to feed messages

patches.name: Always Show Kick Button
patches.description: Always shows the kick button in group member management.

patches.name: Auto claim TongPow
patches.description: Automatically claims CHZZK TongPow rewards when they become available while watching streams.

patches.name: Bypass Moat check
patches.description: Add a setting to bypass the Moat integrity check that can prevent KakaoPay from running.

patches.name: Bypass getText
patches.description: Bypasses the integrity check for getText.

patches.name: Bypass input mention limit in non-multichat
patches.description: Bypass the limit of input mentions in non-multichat rooms

patches.name: Change model
patches.description: Changes the device model to supporting subdevice features

patches.name: Change package name
patches.description: Appends ".revanced" to the package name by default. For DCinside only

options.title: Package name
options.description: The name of the package to rename the app to.

options.title: Update permissions
options.description: Update compatibility receiver permissions. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

options.title: Update providers
options.description: Update provider names declared by the app. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

patches.name: Change package name
patches.description: Appends ".revanced" to the package name by default. For KakaoTalk only

options.title: Package name
options.description: The name of the package to rename the app to.

options.title: Update permissions
options.description: Update compatibility receiver permissions. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

options.title: Update providers

patches.name: Custom branding
patches.description: Customize app branding (name and icon)

options.title: Custom app icon
options.description:
App icon source.

            Special values:
            - Original: Keep the original app icon.
            - Bundled: Use the bundled icon from patches/src/main/resources/custom-branding.

            Any other value is treated as a folder path with custom DCinside launcher icons.

            A custom icon folder must contain one or more of the following directories:
            - mipmap-mdpi
- mipmap-hdpi
- mipmap-xhdpi
- mipmap-xxhdpi
- mipmap-xxxhdpi

            Each icon directory must contain exactly one launcher icon file:
            - ic_launcher.png
- ic_launcher.webp

            The expected launcher icon sizes are:
            - mipmap-mdpi: 48x48 px
- mipmap-hdpi: 72x72 px
- mipmap-xhdpi: 96x96 px
- mipmap-xxhdpi: 144x144 px
- mipmap-xxxhdpi: 192x192 px

            Optionally, you can provide a notification icon as either:
            - drawable/ic_symbol.xml
            - drawable-<dpi>/ic_symbol.png or ic_symbol.webp with sizes:
            - drawable-mdpi: 24x24 px
- drawable-hdpi: 36x36 px
- drawable-xhdpi: 48x48 px
- drawable-xxhdpi: 72x72 px
- drawable-xxxhdpi: 96x96 px
